svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="fEw7YAjXA1syozRMgXxP"> <mxGraphModel dx="2353" dy="1655" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="41rbekOjbsT3yBnaVnjB-2" parent="1" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;html=1;fontSize=27;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;autosizeText=1;" value="Stock Broker Platform" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="370" x="890" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41rbekOjbsT3yBnaVnjB-3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=0;" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;">Functional Requirements</h1><p>1. Users should be able to see live price update of the stocks in their watchlist</p><p>2. User should be able to see price history + chart of a stock</p><p>3. User should be able to place order of a stock at any fixed price</p><p>4. User should see stocks in their portfolio, their live profit/loss&nbsp;</p><p>5. Notification of success/failure status or placed order</p><p><br></p><p><br></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="390" x="425" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41rbekOjbsT3yBnaVnjB-4" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=0;" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;">Non-Functional Requirements</h1><p>1. 60fps rendering performance of live stock price updates</p><p>2. UI should be pessimistic, only show final state when get response from the server</p><p>4. User should be able to use/control the app from keyboard</p><p>5. App should be responsive</p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="210" width="390" x="425" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41rbekOjbsT3yBnaVnjB-5" parent="1" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;verticalAlign=middle;overflow=hidden;" value="<ol><li>Requirements</li><li>Tech Stack</li><li>Data Models</li><ol><li>Data Model</li><li>Data Store Model</li><li>Component API</li><li>Backend API</li></ol><li>Component Architecture</li><ol><li>Component Hierarchy</li><li>Dependency Graph</li></ol><li>Performance &amp; Optimisation</li><li>Accessibility</li><li>Availiability</li></ol>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="240" x="10" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41rbekOjbsT3yBnaVnjB-7" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=0;" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;">Tech Stack</h1><p></p><ol><li>Library: React (depends on team)<br></li><li>State Management: Redux<br></li><li>List Item: div DOM element (Virtualised List)<br></li><li>Network Communication: HTTP Request, WebSocket (because here too communication is bi-directional - client will subscribe/un-subscribe the stocks for which they want the live updates<br></li><li>3rd party packages: react-window, react-redux</li></ol><p></p><p><br></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="310" x="30" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41rbekOjbsT3yBnaVnjB-8" parent="1" div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 1065px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 388px; height: 1px; padding-top: 87px; margin-left: 417px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 186px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.p: 1. Users should be able to see live price update of the stocks in their watchlist
2. User should be able to see price history + chart of a stock
3. User should be able to place order of a stock at any fixed price
4. User should see stocks in their portfolio, their live profit/loss
5. Notification of success/failure status or placed order

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 388px; height: 1px; padding-top: 287px; margin-left: 417px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 206px; overflow: hidden; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.p: 1. 60fps rendering performance of live stock price updates
2. UI should be pessimistic, only show final state when get response from the server
4. User should be able to use/control the app from keyboard

Network Communication: HTTP Request, WebSocket (because here too communication is bi-directional - client will subscribe/un-subscribe the stocks for which they want the live updates
